releaseNotes: Adds Phase U4 parallel byte-range installer preparation for faster update downloads when the update host supports HTTP ranges.
Checks installer metadata with HEAD and Range probes, then downloads the installer in 4 to 8 MB chunks with controlled parallel workers.
Retries failed chunks and falls back automatically to normal streaming download if range download is not supported or fails.
Verifies prepared installer size and optional SHA-256 when provided before marking the update ready.
Reuses an already prepared installer when valid, cleans stale partial/chunk files, and keeps the update cache small.
Applies the faster downloader to both Prepare update and Download + install flows while keeping Supabase Storage as the primary update host and GitHub Releases as fallback.
Updates real package/builder metadata to 10.4.6 and preserves the future-safe installer pattern Inventra-Setup-${version}.${ext}.
No app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, users, Supabase data, backup data, updater branding, or icon assets are deleted.
